nodes.label: AI as personal assistant for routine tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for critical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: Personally I use ChatGPT sprinkled throughout my day sort of like a personal assistant

nodes.label: AI for non-critical code generation
nodes.grounding_span: This is generally data analysis code that is in the non-critical path of work we do

nodes.label: AI as collaborative hand-holding partner
nodes.grounding_span: Definitely more of a collaboration. I would describe it more like holding its hand through a task

nodes.label: AI as syntax aid for memory fallibility
nodes.grounding_span: My downfall is remembering syntax, and I think keeping syntax straight is where AI really helps me the most

nodes.label: AI as knowledge expander requiring expert oversight
nodes.label_negative: AI as autonomous knowledge source without verification
nodes.grounding_span: I believe AI is a great tool to speed work up or even expand your knowledge, but it has to be handled very carefully

nodes.label: AI training participation for future-proofing
nodes.label_negative: AI training participation as job devaluation
nodes.grounding_span: I have been working with DataAnnotations and some other companies to try to teach physics to AI

nodes.label: Personal competence and independent learning
nodes.grounding_span: I value being able to learn how to perform tasks independently

nodes.label: Productivity and time efficiency
nodes.grounding_span: still saves a ton of time compared to doing it myself

nodes.label: Professional confidence and trust in outcomes
nodes.grounding_span: it gives me more confidence in the end solution

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for syntax help
nodes.grounding_span: A time when AI made me satisfied was when I was able to simply ask it for a set of MATLAB commands

nodes.label: Frustration with AI context forgetting
nodes.grounding_span: The time I think I have been most frustrated was just what I was telling you previously about how I kept having to correct and remind ChatGPT

nodes.label: Caution about over-delegation based on team experience
nodes.grounding_span: I think it serves as an example of how not to use AI in your work

nodes.label: Aspirational desire for increased trust
nodes.grounding_span: I would like to develop more trust with the models so that I can take a more hands-off approach

nodes.label: Iterative context management — re-entering code to maintain AI memory
nodes.grounding_span: I often find myself having to augment ChatGPTs generated solution and re-enter it into the conversation

nodes.label: Independent verification tendency — double-checking AI outputs manually
nodes.grounding_span: I almost always double check the answers by hand anyways
